Personal & professional details

Account details are managed here. Splose practitioner info (AHPRA, NDIS provider #) is edited in the Splose portal.

Changes here update your app account. Email and role can only be changed by your administrator.

Work location schedule

Pick where you'll be each day. The smart scheduler reads this to pick patients whose suburbs line up with your location, and to estimate travel legs.

Week 17 · Mon 20 Apr 2026 (AWST)

Travel bases (Google Maps)

These addresses are used to pre-compute travel legs for every session. Your Perth metro office is the default base; add as many home bases as you need — they can be remote (Teams/online work from anywhere) or local (a second house, a family member's place, an Air-BnB for regional weeks).

Single office base

↻ Recalculate travel for this week → Runs the Distance Matrix API for every back-to-back session pair, using each session's Splose location and the bases above.

Notifications & alarms

Choose when the app reminds you about fields that affect the scheduler. Notifications are delivered via email + Teams chat.

Remind me to update next week's work locations
Fires every Friday at 16:00 AWST if locations for the following week aren't set. Without this, travel estimates and day-intensity calculations fall back to "clinic default" — which can hide real travel costs.
Remind me 3 days before a plan expiry
Nudges you to check remaining hours / talk to the plan manager before funding cuts off.
Notify me when a cancellation is detected
Delta feed polls every 90 seconds. You'll get a Teams ping the moment Splose marks a session cancelled.
Weekly utilisation digest
Email summary of billable hours, cancellations, capacity alerts. Sends Friday 17:30.
CPD registration-year reminder
Pings you mid-year and three months before AHPRA renewal if CPD hours are behind pace.

Duration 1 hr

Eight session types map onto three Splose write-surfaces: Appointment, Support-Activity, or Busy-Time.

Client-facing (Splose Appointment)

Billable non-face-to-face (Support-Activity)

Internal (Busy-Time)

↪ Case noting is folded under Admin until Ann's workflow is confirmed. Splose has no dedicated busy-time-type or service for it.

This week — Ann

Architecture note. Smart Booking reads availability from Splose, applies clustering + capacity logic, and writes the appointment back via POST /appointments. Splose remains the single source of truth — the scheduler never holds shadow state. Suggestions are recomputed live on every poll (90 s) so you're never acting on stale data.
11–17 May, 2026

Travel Settings

Configure how travel time and distance is calculated.

Calculation
Enable travel calculation Automatically calculate travel time between appointments
Calculate first trip from base location Include travel from your home/base to first appointment
Calculate return-to-base at end of day
Warn if travel exceeds Alert when a trip is unusually long
ATO Kilometre Rate
Current rate ($/km) Set by the Practice Owner in Business Settings. Used across all travel logbooks.

Scheduling Assistant Free/busy grid · live from calendar

Therapists:
Free Busy Outside working hours Common free slot

Auto-fit Multiple Clients Smart scheduling with clustering & availability

How it works: Select multiple clients. The algorithm finds optimal appointment times by clustering clients by region, respecting availability, and prioritizing expiring NDIS plans.
